name: 0wl
description: Local-first browser extension for website usage tracking and blocking.

scripts.build:firefox: npm run typecheck && wxt build --browser firefox --mv3 && node scripts/finalize-wxt-build.mjs firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run typecheck && wxt build --browser chrome --mv3 && node scripts/finalize-wxt-build.mjs chrome
scripts.build:edge: npm run typecheck && wxt build --browser edge --mv3 && node scripts/finalize-wxt-build.mjs edge
scripts.build:opera: npm run typecheck && wxt build --browser opera --mv3 && node scripts/finalize-wxt-build.mjs opera
scripts.build:safari: npm run typecheck && wxt build --browser safari --mv2 && node scripts/finalize-wxt-build.mjs safari
scripts.build:all: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:edge && npm run build:opera
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && node scripts/package-wxt-output.mjs firefox
scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build:chrome && node scripts/package-wxt-output.mjs chrome
scripts.zip:edge: npm run build:edge && node scripts/package-wxt-output.mjs edge
scripts.zip:opera: npm run build:opera && node scripts/package-wxt-output.mjs opera
scripts.zip:safari: npm run build:safari && node scripts/package-wxt-output.mjs safari
